    Retail Sales Dashboard

    Overview

    Placeholder page for a dashboard case study focused on revenue tracking, product mix, and regional sales performance.

    Planned Questions

    • Which products and regions drive the most revenue?
    • How are sales trends changing over time?
    • What metrics should stakeholders monitor daily or weekly?

    Planned Sections

    • Business reporting goal
    • Data model and KPI definitions
    • Dashboard layout and visual choices
    • Key insights and stakeholder use cases
